columns.description: Set of columns of type GridColDef[].

activeChartId.description: The id of the active chart.

aggregationFunctions.description: Aggregation functions available on the grid.

aggregationModel.description: Set the aggregation model of the grid.

aggregationRowsScope.description: Rows used to generate the aggregated value. If filtered, the aggregated values are generated using only the rows currently passing the filtering process. If all, the aggregated values are generated using all the rows.

aiAssistant.description: If true, the AI Assistant is enabled.

aiAssistantActiveConversationIndex.description: The index of the active AI Assistant conversation.

aiAssistantConversations.description: The conversations with the AI Assistant.

aiAssistantSuggestions.description: The suggestions of the AI Assistant.

allowAiAssistantDataSampling.description: If true, the AI Assistant is allowed to pick up values from random cells from each column to build the prompt context.

aria-labelledby.description: The id of the element containing a label for the Data Grid.

autoHeight.description: If true, the Data Grid height is dynamic and takes as much space as it needs to display all rows. Use it instead of a flex parent container approach, if: - you don't need to set a minimum or maximum height for the Data Grid - you want to avoid the scrollbar flickering when the content changes

autoPageSize.description: If true, the pageSize is calculated according to the container size and the max number of rows to avoid rendering a vertical scroll bar.

autosizeOnMount.description: If true, columns are autosized after the datagrid is mounted.

autosizeOptions.description: The options for autosize when user-initiated.

cellModesModel.description: Controls the modes of the cells.

cellSelection.description: If true, the cell selection mode is enabled.

cellSelectionFillHandle.description: If true, a fill handle is shown at the bottom-right corner of the cell selection. Dragging the fill handle fills target cells with the values from selected cells. Requires cellSelection to be enabled.

cellSelectionModel.description: Set the cell selection model of the grid.

chartsIntegration.description: If true, the charts integration feature is enabled.

checkboxColDef.description: Definition of the column rendered when the checkboxSelection prop is enabled.

checkboxSelection.description: If true, the Data Grid will display an extra column with checkboxes for selecting rows.

checkboxSelectionVisibleOnly.description: If true, the "Select All" header checkbox selects only the rows on the current page. To be used in combination with checkboxSelection. It only works if the pagination is enabled.

classes.description: Override or extend the styles applied to the component.

clipboardCopyCellDelimiter.description: The character used to separate cell values when copying to the clipboard.

columnBufferPx.description: Column region in pixels to render before/after the viewport

columnFilterDebounceMs.description: The milliseconds delay to wait after a keystroke before triggering filtering in the columns menu.

columnGroupHeaderHeight.description: Sets the height in pixels of the column group headers in the Data Grid. Inherits the columnHeaderHeight value if not set.

columnHeaderHeight.description: Sets the height in pixel of the column headers in the Data Grid.

columnVisibilityModel.description: Set the column visibility model of the Data Grid. If defined, the Data Grid will ignore the hide property in GridColDef.

dataSourceRevalidateMs.description: If positive, the Data Grid will periodically revalidate data source rows by re-fetching them from the server when the cache entry has expired. If the refetched rows are different from the current rows, the grid will update the rows. Set to 0 to disable polling.

defaultGroupingExpansionDepth.description:
If above 0, the row children will be expanded up to this depth.
If equal to -1, all the row children will be expanded.

density.description: Set the density of the Data Grid.

detailPanelExpandedRowIds.description: The row ids to show the detail panel.

disableAutosize.description: If true, column autosizing on header separator double-click is disabled.

disableChildrenFiltering.description: If true, the filtering will only be applied to the top level rows when grouping rows with the treeData prop.

disableChildrenSorting.description: If true, the sorting will only be applied to the top level rows when grouping rows with the treeData prop.

disableClipboardPaste.description: If true, the clipboard paste is disabled.

disableColumnMenu.description: If true, the column menu is disabled.

disableColumnPinning.description: If true, the column pinning is disabled.

disableColumnSorting.description: If true, the column sorting feature will be disabled.

disableDensitySelector.description: If true, the density selector is disabled.

disableEval.description: If true, eval() is not used for performance optimization.

disableMultipleColumnsFiltering.description: If true, filtering with multiple columns is disabled.

disableMultipleColumnsSorting.description: If true, the sorting with multiple columns is disabled.

disableMultipleRowSelection.description: If true, multiple selection using the Ctrl/CMD or Shift key is disabled. The MIT DataGrid will ignore this prop, unless checkboxSelection is enabled.

disablePivoting.description: If true, the pivoting feature is disabled.

disableRowGrouping.description: If true, the row grouping is disabled.

disableRowSelectionExcludeModel.description: If true, the Data Grid will not use the exclude model optimization when selecting all rows.

disableRowSelectionOnClick.description: If true, the selection on click on a row or cell is disabled.

editMode.description: Controls whether to use the cell or row editing.

estimatedRowCount.description: Use if the actual rowCount is not known upfront, but an estimation is available. If some rows have children (for instance in the tree data), this number represents the amount of top level rows. Applicable only with paginationMode="server" and when rowCount="-1"

experimentalFeatures.description: Unstable features, breaking changes might be introduced. For each feature, if the flag is not explicitly set to true, then the feature is fully disabled, and neither property nor method calls will have any effect.

filterDebounceMs.description: The milliseconds delay to wait after a keystroke before triggering filtering.

filterMode.description:
Filtering can be processed on the server or client-side.
Set it to 'server' if you would like to handle filtering on the server-side.

filterModel.description: Set the filter model of the Data Grid.

getAggregationPosition.description: Determines the position of an aggregated value.

GridAggregationPosition | null.name: GridAggregationPosition | null
GridAggregationPosition | null.description: Position of the aggregated value (if null, the group isn't aggregated).

getCellClassName.description: Function that applies CSS classes dynamically on cells.

string.name: string
string.description: The CSS class to apply to the cell.

getDetailPanelContent.description: Function that returns the element to render in row detail.

getDetailPanelHeight.description: Function that returns the height of the row detail panel.

number | 'auto'.name: number | 'auto'
number | 'auto'.description: The height in pixels or "auto" to use the content height.

getEstimatedRowHeight.description:
Function that returns the estimated height for a row.
Only works if dynamic row height is used.
Once the row height is measured this value is discarded.

number | null.name: number | null
number | null.description: The estimated row height value. If null or undefined then the default row height, based on the density, is applied.

getPivotDerivedColumns.description:
Allows to generate derived columns from actual columns that will be used for pivoting.
Useful e.g. for date columns to generate year, quarter, month, etc.

column.name: column
column.description: The column to generate derived columns for.

getLocaleText.name: getLocaleText
getLocaleText.description: The function to get the locale text.

getRowClassName.description: Function that applies CSS classes dynamically on rows.

string.name: string
string.description: The CSS class to apply to the row.

getRowHeight.description: Function that sets the row height per row.

GridRowHeightReturnValue.name: GridRowHeightReturnValue
GridRowHeightReturnValue.description: The row height value. If null or undefined then the default row height is applied. If "auto" then the row height is calculated based on the content.

getRowId.description:
Return the id of a given GridRowModel.
Ensure the reference of this prop is stable to avoid performance implications.
It could be done by either defining the prop outside of the component or by memoizing it.

getRowSpacing.description: Function that allows to specify the spacing between rows.

getTreeDataPath.description:
Determines the path of a row in the tree data.
For instance, a row with the path ["A", "B"] is the child of the row with the path ["A"].
Note that all paths must contain at least one element.

row.name: row
row.description: The row from which we want the path.

groupingColDef.description: The grouping column used by the tree data.

headerFilterHeight.description: Override the height of the header filters.

headerFilters.description: If true, the header filters feature is enabled.

hideFooter.description: If true, the footer component is hidden.

hideFooterPagination.description: If true, the pagination component in the footer is hidden.

hideFooterRowCount.description: If true, the row count in the footer is hidden. It has no effect if the pagination is enabled.

hideFooterSelectedRowCount.description: If true, the selected row count in the footer is hidden.

historyEventHandlers.description: Map of grid events to their undo/redo handlers.

historyStackSize.description:
The maximum size of the history stack.
Set to 0 to disable the undo/redo feature.

historyValidationEvents.description: List of grid events after which the history stack items should be re-validated.

ignoreDiacritics.description: If true, the diacritics (accents) are ignored when filtering or quick filtering. E.g. when filter value is cafe, the rows with café will be visible.

ignoreValueFormatterDuringExport.description: If true, the Data Grid will not use valueFormatter when exporting to CSV or copying to clipboard. If an object is provided, you can choose to ignore the valueFormatter for CSV export or clipboard export.

initialState.description: The initial state of the DataGridPremium. The data in it is set in the state on initialization but isn't controlled. If one of the data in initialState is also being controlled, then the control state wins.

isCellEditable.description: Callback fired when a cell is rendered, returns true if the cell is editable.

boolean.name: boolean
boolean.description: A boolean indicating if the cell is editable.

isGroupExpandedByDefault.description: Determines if a group should be expanded after its creation. This prop takes priority over the defaultGroupingExpansionDepth prop.

node.name: node
node.description: The node of the group to test.

boolean.name: boolean
boolean.description: A boolean indicating if the group is expanded.

isRowReorderable.description: Indicates whether a row is reorderable.

params.name: params
params.description: With all properties from the row.

boolean.name: boolean
boolean.description: A boolean indicating if the row is reorderable.

isRowSelectable.description: Determines if a row can be selected.

boolean.name: boolean
boolean.description: A boolean indicating if the row is selectable.

isValidRowReorder.description: Indicates if a row reorder attempt is valid. Can be used to disable certain row reorder operations based on the context. The internal validation is still applied, preventing unsupported use-cases. Use isValidRowReorder() to add additional validation rules to the default ones.

context.name: context
context.description: The context object containing all information about the reorder operation.

boolean.name: boolean
boolean.description: A boolean indicating if the reorder operation should go through.

keepColumnPositionIfDraggedOutside.description: If true, moving the mouse pointer outside the grid before releasing the mouse button in a column re-order action will not cause the column to jump back to its original position.

keepNonExistentRowsSelected.description: If true, the selection model will retain selected rows that do not exist. Useful when using server side pagination and row selections need to be retained when changing pages.

label.description: The label of the Data Grid. If the showToolbar prop is true, the label will be displayed in the toolbar and applied to the aria-label attribute of the grid. If the showToolbar prop is false, the label will not be visible but will be applied to the aria-label attribute of the grid.

lazyLoading.description: Used together with dataSource to enable lazy loading. If enabled, the grid stops adding paginationModel to the data requests (getRows) and starts sending start and end values depending on the loading mode and the scroll position.

lazyLoadingRequestThrottleMs.description: If positive, the Data Grid will throttle data source requests on rendered rows interval change.

listView.description: If true, displays the data in a list view. Use in combination with listViewColumn.

listViewColumn.description: Definition of the column rendered when the listView prop is enabled.

loading.description: If true, a loading overlay is displayed.

localeText.description:
Set the locale text of the Data Grid.
You can find all the translation keys supported in [the source](https://github.com/mui/mui-x/blob/HEAD/packages/x-data-grid/src/constants/localeTextConstants.ts) in the GitHub repository.

logger.description: Pass a custom logger in the components that implements the Logger interface.

logLevel.description: Allows to pass the logging level or false to turn off logging.

multipleColumnsSortingMode.description:
If set to "always", the multi-sorting is applied without modifier key.
Otherwise, the modifier key is required for multi-sorting to be applied.

nonce.description: Nonce of the inline styles for [Content Security Policy](https://www.w3.org/TR/2016/REC-CSP2-20161215/#script-src-the-nonce-attribute).

onActiveChartIdChange.description: Callback fired when the active chart changes.

onAggregationModelChange.description: Callback fired when the row grouping model changes.

onAiAssistantActiveConversationIndexChan.description: Callback fired when the AI Assistant active conversation index changes.

onAiAssistantConversationsChange.description: Callback fired when the AI Assistant conversations change.

onBeforeClipboardPasteStart.description:
Callback fired before the clipboard paste operation starts.
Use it to confirm or cancel the paste operation.

Promise<any>.name: Promise<any>
Promise<any>.description: A promise that resolves to confirm the paste operation, and rejects to cancel it.

onCellClick.description: Callback fired when any cell is clicked.

onCellDoubleClick.description: Callback fired when a double click event comes from a cell element.

onCellEditStart.description: Callback fired when the cell turns to edit mode.

event.name: event
event.description: The event that caused this prop to be called.

onCellEditStop.description: Callback fired when the cell turns to view mode.

event.name: event
event.description: The event that caused this prop to be called.

onCellKeyDown.description: Callback fired when a keydown event comes from a cell element.

onCellModesModelChange.description: Callback fired when the cellModesModel prop changes.

cellModesModel.name: cellModesModel
cellModesModel.description: Object containing which cells are in "edit" mode.

onCellSelectionModelChange.description: Callback fired when the selection state of one or multiple cells changes.

cellSelectionModel.name: cellSelectionModel
cellSelectionModel.description: Object in the shape of GridCellSelectionModel containing the selected cells.

onClipboardCopy.description: Callback called when the data is copied to the clipboard.

data.name: data
data.description: The data copied to the clipboard.

onClipboardPasteEnd.description: Callback fired when the clipboard paste operation ends.

onClipboardPasteStart.description: Callback fired when the clipboard paste operation starts.

onColumnHeaderClick.description: Callback fired when a click event comes from a column header element.

onColumnHeaderContextMenu.description: Callback fired when a contextmenu event comes from a column header element.

onColumnHeaderDoubleClick.description: Callback fired when a double click event comes from a column header element.

onColumnHeaderEnter.description: Callback fired when a mouse enter event comes from a column header element.

onColumnHeaderLeave.description: Callback fired when a mouse leave event comes from a column header element.

onColumnHeaderOut.description: Callback fired when a mouseout event comes from a column header element.

onColumnHeaderOver.description: Callback fired when a mouseover event comes from a column header element.

onColumnOrderChange.description: Callback fired when a column is reordered.

onColumnResize.description: Callback fired while a column is being resized.

onColumnVisibilityModelChange.description: Callback fired when the column visibility model changes.

onColumnWidthChange.description: Callback fired when the width of a column is changed.

onDataSourceError.description: Callback fired when a data source request fails.

onDensityChange.description: Callback fired when the density changes.

onDetailPanelExpandedRowIdsChange.description: Callback fired when the detail panel of a row is opened or closed.

ids.name: ids
ids.description: The ids of the rows which have the detail panel open.

onExcelExportStateChange.description: Callback fired when the state of the Excel export changes.

inProgress.name: inProgress
inProgress.description: Indicates if the task is in progress.

onFetchRows.description: Callback fired when rowCount is set and the next batch of virtualized rows is rendered.

onFilterModelChange.description: Callback fired when the Filter model changes before the filters are applied.

onMenuClose.description: Callback fired when the menu is closed.

onMenuOpen.description: Callback fired when the menu is opened.

onPaginationMetaChange.description: Callback fired when the pagination meta has changed.

onPaginationModelChange.description: Callback fired when the pagination model has changed.

onPinnedColumnsChange.description: Callback fired when the pinned columns have changed.

onPivotActiveChange.description: Callback fired when the pivot active state changes.

isPivotActive.name: isPivotActive
isPivotActive.description: Whether the data grid is in pivot mode.

onPivotModelChange.description: Callback fired when the pivot model changes.

onPivotPanelOpenChange.description: Callback fired when the pivot side panel open state changes.

pivotPanelOpen.name: pivotPanelOpen
pivotPanelOpen.description: Whether the pivot side panel is visible.

onPreferencePanelClose.description: Callback fired when the preferences panel is closed.

onPreferencePanelOpen.description: Callback fired when the preferences panel is opened.

onProcessRowUpdateError.description: Callback called when processRowUpdate() throws an error or rejects.

onPrompt.description: The function to be used to process the prompt.

conversationId.name: conversationId
conversationId.description: The id of the conversation the prompt is part of. If not passed, prompt response will return a new conversation id that can be used to continue the newly started conversation.

onRedo.description: Callback fired when a redo operation is executed.

onResize.description: Callback fired when the Data Grid is resized.

onRowClick.description:
Callback fired when a row is clicked.
Not called if the target clicked is an interactive element added by the built-in columns.

onRowCountChange.description: Callback fired when the row count has changed.

onRowDoubleClick.description: Callback fired when a double click event comes from a row container element.

onRowEditStart.description: Callback fired when the row turns to edit mode.

event.name: event
event.description: The event that caused this prop to be called.

onRowEditStop.description: Callback fired when the row turns to view mode.

event.name: event
event.description: The event that caused this prop to be called.

onRowGroupingModelChange.description: Callback fired when the row grouping model changes.

onRowModesModelChange.description: Callback fired when the rowModesModel prop changes.

rowModesModel.name: rowModesModel
rowModesModel.description: Object containing which rows are in "edit" mode.

onRowOrderChange.description: Callback fired when a row is being reordered.

onRowSelectionModelChange.description: Callback fired when the selection state of one or multiple rows changes.

rowSelectionModel.name: rowSelectionModel
rowSelectionModel.description: With all the row ids GridSelectionModel.

onRowsScrollEnd.description: Callback fired when scrolling to the bottom of the grid viewport.

details.name: details
details.description:
Additional details for this callback.
Prefer to use {@link https://mui.com/x/react-data-grid/server-side-data/lazy-loading/#infinite-loading Server-side data-Infinite loading} unless it doesn't fulfill your needs.

onSidebarClose.description: Callback fired when the sidebar is closed.

onSidebarOpen.description: Callback fired when the sidebar is opened.

onSortModelChange.description: Callback fired when the sort model changes before a column is sorted.

onUndo.description: Callback fired when an undo operation is executed.

pageSizeOptions.description: Select the pageSize dynamically using the component UI.

paginationMeta.description: The extra information about the pagination state of the Data Grid. Only applicable with paginationMode="server".

paginationMode.description:
Pagination can be processed on the server or client-side.
Set it to 'client' if you would like to handle the pagination on the client-side.
Set it to 'server' if you would like to handle the pagination on the server-side.

paginationModel.description: The pagination model of type GridPaginationModel which refers to current page and pageSize.

pinnedColumns.description: The column fields to display pinned to left or right.

pinnedColumnsSectionSeparator.description: Sets the type of separator between pinned columns and non-pinned columns.

pinnedRows.description: Rows data to pin on top or bottom.

pinnedRowsSectionSeparator.description: Sets the type of separator between pinned rows and non-pinned rows.

pivotActive.description: If true, the data grid will show data in pivot mode using the pivotModel.

pivotingColDef.description: The column definition overrides for the columns generated by the pivoting feature. Pass either a partial column definition to apply the same overrides to all pivot columns, or a callback to apply different overrides to each pivot column. For server-side pivoting, only the PivotingColDefCallback signature is supported, and the prop is required.

pivotModel.description: The pivot model of the grid. Will be used to generate the pivot data. In case of pivotActive being false, the pivot model is still used to populate the pivot panel.

pivotPanelOpen.description: If true, the pivot side panel is visible.

processRowUpdate.description: Callback called before updating a row with new values in the row and cell editing.

newRow.name: newRow
newRow.description: Row object with the new values.

oldRow.name: oldRow
oldRow.description: Row object with the old values.

R | Promise<R>.name: R | Promise<R>
R | Promise<R>.description: The final values to update the row.

resizeThrottleMs.description: The milliseconds throttle delay for resizing the grid.

rowBufferPx.description: Row region in pixels to render before/after the viewport

rowCount.description: Set the total number of rows, if it is different from the length of the value rows prop. If some rows have children (for instance in the tree data), this number represents the amount of top level rows. Only works with paginationMode="server", ignored when paginationMode="client".

rowGroupingColumnMode.description: If single, all the columns that are grouped are represented in the same grid column. If multiple, each column that is grouped is represented in its own grid column.

rowGroupingModel.description: Set the row grouping model of the grid.

rowHeight.description: Sets the height in pixel of a row in the Data Grid.

rowModesModel.description: Controls the modes of the rows.

rowReordering.description: If true, the reordering of rows is enabled.

rows.description: Set of rows of type GridRowsProp.

rowSelection.description: If false, the row selection mode is disabled.

rowSelectionModel.description: Sets the row selection model of the Data Grid.

rowSelectionPropagation.description:
When rowSelectionPropagation.descendants is set to true. - Selecting a parent selects all its filtered descendants automatically. - Deselecting a parent row deselects all its filtered descendants automatically.

When rowSelectionPropagation.parents is set to true - Selecting all the filtered descendants of a parent selects the parent automatically. - Deselecting a descendant of a selected parent deselects the parent automatically.

Works with tree data and row grouping on the client-side only.

rowsLoadingMode.description:
Loading rows can be processed on the server or client-side.
Set it to 'client' if you would like enable infnite loading.
Set it to 'server' if you would like to enable lazy loading.

rowSpacingType.description: Sets the type of space between rows added by getRowSpacing.

rowSpanning.description: If true, the Data Grid will auto span the cells over the rows having the same value.

scrollbarSize.description: Override the height/width of the Data Grid inner scrollbar.

scrollEndThreshold.description: Set the area in px at the bottom of the grid viewport where onRowsScrollEnd is called. If combined with lazyLoading, it defines the area where the next data request is triggered.

setTreeDataPath.description:
Updates the tree path in a row model.
Used when reordering rows across different parents in tree data.

path.name: path
path.description: The new path for the row.

R.name: R
R.description: The updated row model with the new path.

showCellVerticalBorder.description: If true, vertical borders will be displayed between cells.

showColumnVerticalBorder.description: If true, vertical borders will be displayed between column header items.

slotProps.description: Overridable components props dynamically passed to the component at rendering.

sortingMode.description:
Sorting can be processed on the server or client-side.
Set it to 'client' if you would like to handle sorting on the client-side.
Set it to 'server' if you would like to handle sorting on the server-side.

sortingOrder.description: The order of the sorting sequence.

sortModel.description: Set the sort model of the Data Grid.

splitClipboardPastedText.description: The function is used to split the pasted text into rows and cells.

text.name: text
text.description: The text pasted from the clipboard.

delimiter.name: delimiter
delimiter.description: The delimiter used to split the text. Default is the tab character and can be set with the clipboardCopyCellDelimiter prop.

Array<Array<string>> | null.name: Array<Array<string>> | null
Array<Array<string>> | null.description: A 2D array of strings. The first dimension is the rows, the second dimension is the columns.

tabNavigation.description:
Sets the tab navigation behavior for the Data Grid.
- "none": No Data Grid specific tab navigation. Pressing the tab key will move the focus to the next element in the tab sequence.
- "content": Pressing the tab key will move the focus to the next cell in the same row or the first cell in the next row. Shift+Tab will move the focus to the previous cell in the same row or the last cell in the previous row. Tab navigation is not enabled for the header.
- "header": Pressing the tab key will move the focus to the next column group, column header or header filter. Shift+Tab will move the focus to the previous column group, column header or header filter. Tab navigation is not enabled for the content.
- "all": Combines the "content" and "header" behavior.

throttleRowsMs.description: If positive, the Data Grid will throttle updates coming from apiRef.current.updateRows and apiRef.current.setRows. It can be useful if you have a high update rate but do not want to do heavy work like filtering / sorting or rendering on each individual update.

treeData.description: If true, the rows will be gathered in a tree structure according to the getTreeDataPath prop.

virtualizeColumnsWithAutoRowHeight.description: If true, the Data Grid enables column virtualization when getRowHeight is set to () => 'auto'. By default, column virtualization is disabled when dynamic row height is enabled to measure the row height correctly. For datasets with a large number of columns, this can cause performance issues. The downside of enabling this prop is that the row height will be estimated based the cells that are currently rendered, which can cause row height change when scrolling horizontally.

slotDescriptions.aiAssistantIcon: Icon used for the AI Assistant button
slotDescriptions.aiAssistantPanel:
Component rendered when AI Assistant panel is open. Only needed when `aiAssistant` prop is passed to the grid.
Pass `GridAiAssistantPanel` to render the default AI Assistant panel.
slotDescriptions.aiAssistantPanelCloseIcon: Icon used for the AI Assistant panel close button
slotDescriptions.aiAssistantPanelHistoryIcon: Icon used for the AI Assistant panel history icon
slotDescriptions.aiAssistantPanelNewConversationIcon: Icon used for the AI Assistant panel new conversation button
slotDescriptions.baseAutocomplete: The custom Autocomplete component used in the grid for both header and cells.
slotDescriptions.baseBadge: The custom Badge component used in the grid for both header and cells.
slotDescriptions.baseButton: The custom Button component used in the grid.
slotDescriptions.baseCheckbox: The custom Checkbox component used in the grid for both header and cells.
slotDescriptions.baseChip: The custom Chip component used in the grid.
slotDescriptions.baseCircularProgress: The custom CircularProgress component used in the grid.
slotDescriptions.baseDivider: The custom Divider component used in the grid.
slotDescriptions.baseIconButton: The custom IconButton component used in the grid.
slotDescriptions.baseInput: The custom Input component used in the grid.
slotDescriptions.baseLinearProgress: The custom LinearProgress component used in the grid.
slotDescriptions.baseMenuItem: The custom MenuItem component used in the grid.
slotDescriptions.baseMenuList: The custom MenuList component used in the grid.
slotDescriptions.basePagination: The custom Pagination component used in the grid.
slotDescriptions.basePopper: The custom Popper component used in the grid.
slotDescriptions.baseSelect: The custom Select component used in the grid.
slotDescriptions.baseSelectOption: The custom SelectOption component used in the grid.
slotDescriptions.baseSkeleton: The custom Skeleton component used in the grid.
slotDescriptions.baseSwitch: The custom Switch component used in the grid.
slotDescriptions.baseTabs: The custom Tabs component used in the grid.
slotDescriptions.baseTextarea: The custom Textarea component used in the grid for multiline text editing.
slotDescriptions.baseTextField: The custom TextField component used in the grid.
slotDescriptions.baseToggleButton: The custom ToggleButton component used in the grid.
slotDescriptions.baseTooltip: The custom Tooltip component used in the grid.
slotDescriptions.booleanCellFalseIcon: Icon displayed on the boolean cell to represent the false value.
slotDescriptions.booleanCellTrueIcon: Icon displayed on the boolean cell to represent the true value.
slotDescriptions.bottomContainer: Component rendered for the bottom container.
slotDescriptions.chartsIcon: Icon used for the charts configuration button
slotDescriptions.chartsMenuAddIcon: Icon used for the add button in the charts configuration panel menu
slotDescriptions.chartsMenuMoveDownIcon: Icon used for the move down button in the charts configuration panel menu
slotDescriptions.chartsMenuMoveToBottomIcon: Icon used for the move to bottom button in the charts configuration panel menu
slotDescriptions.chartsMenuMoveToTopIcon: Icon used for the move to top button in the charts configuration panel menu
slotDescriptions.chartsMenuMoveUpIcon: Icon used for the move up button in the charts configuration panel menu
slotDescriptions.chartsMenuRemoveIcon: Icon used for the remove button in the charts configuration panel menu
slotDescriptions.chartsPanel:
Component rendered when charts panel is open. Only needed when `chartsIntegration` prop is passed to the grid.
Pass `GridChartsPanel` to render the default charts panel.
slotDescriptions.chartsSearchClearIcon: Icon used for the clear button in the sidebar search field in the charts configuration panel
slotDescriptions.chartsSearchIcon: Icon used for the search icon in the sidebar search field in the charts configuration panel
slotDescriptions.chartsSyncDisabledIcon: Icon used for the sync button in the charts configuration panel when sync is disabled
slotDescriptions.chartsSyncIcon: Icon used for the sync button in the charts configuration panel when sync is enabled
slotDescriptions.collapsibleIcon: Icon displayed in the collapsible to indicate if it is open or closed.
slotDescriptions.columnFilteredIcon: Icon displayed on the column header menu to show that a filter has been applied to the column.
slotDescriptions.columnHeaderFilterIconButton: Filter icon component rendered in each column header.
slotDescriptions.columnHeaders: Component responsible for rendering the column headers.
slotDescriptions.columnHeaderSortIcon: Sort icon component rendered in each column header.
slotDescriptions.columnMenu: Column menu component rendered by clicking on the 3 dots "kebab" icon in column headers.
slotDescriptions.columnMenuAggregationIcon: Icon displayed in column menu for aggregation
slotDescriptions.columnMenuClearIcon: Icon displayed in column menu for clearing values
slotDescriptions.columnMenuFilterIcon: Icon displayed in column menu for filter
slotDescriptions.columnMenuGroupIcon: Icon displayed in column menu for grouping
slotDescriptions.columnMenuHideIcon: Icon displayed in column menu for hiding column
slotDescriptions.columnMenuIcon: Icon displayed on the side of the column header title to display the filter input component.
slotDescriptions.columnMenuManageColumnsIcon: Icon displayed in column menu for showing all columns
slotDescriptions.columnMenuPinLeftIcon: Icon displayed in column menu for left pinning
slotDescriptions.columnMenuPinRightIcon: Icon displayed in column menu for right pinning
slotDescriptions.columnMenuSortAscendingIcon: Icon displayed in column menu for ascending sort
slotDescriptions.columnMenuSortDescendingIcon: Icon displayed in column menu for descending sort
slotDescriptions.columnMenuUngroupIcon: Icon displayed in column menu for ungrouping
slotDescriptions.columnMenuUnsortIcon: Icon displayed in column menu for unsort
slotDescriptions.columnReorderIcon: Icon displayed on the column reorder button.
slotDescriptions.columnResizeIcon: Icon displayed in between two column headers that allows to resize the column header.
slotDescriptions.columnSelectorIcon: Icon displayed on the column menu selector tab.
slotDescriptions.columnsManagement: Component used inside Grid Columns panel to manage columns.
slotDescriptions.columnSortedAscendingIcon: Icon displayed on the side of the column header title when sorted in ascending order.
slotDescriptions.columnSortedDescendingIcon: Icon displayed on the side of the column header title when sorted in descending order.
slotDescriptions.columnsPanel: GridColumns panel component rendered when clicking the columns button.
slotDescriptions.columnUnsortedIcon: Icon displayed on the side of the column header title when unsorted.
slotDescriptions.densityComfortableIcon: Icon displayed on the "comfortable" density option in the toolbar.
slotDescriptions.densityCompactIcon: Icon displayed on the compact density option in the toolbar.
slotDescriptions.densityStandardIcon: Icon displayed on the standard density option in the toolbar.
slotDescriptions.detailPanelCollapseIcon: Icon displayed on the detail panel toggle column when expanded.
slotDescriptions.detailPanelExpandIcon: Icon displayed on the detail panel toggle column when collapsed.
slotDescriptions.detailPanels: Component responsible for rendering the detail panels.
slotDescriptions.emptyPivotOverlay: Component rendered when pivot mode is enabled but no rows are defined.
slotDescriptions.exportIcon: Icon displayed on the open export button present in the toolbar by default.
slotDescriptions.filterPanel: Filter panel component rendered when clicking the filter button.
slotDescriptions.filterPanelAddIcon: Icon displayed for deleting the filter from filter panel.
slotDescriptions.filterPanelDeleteIcon: Icon displayed for deleting the filter from filter panel.
slotDescriptions.filterPanelRemoveAllIcon: Icon displayed for deleting all the active filters from filter panel.
slotDescriptions.footer: Footer component rendered at the bottom of the grid viewport.
slotDescriptions.footerRowCount: Row count component rendered in the footer
slotDescriptions.groupingCriteriaCollapseIcon: Icon displayed on the grouping column when the children are expanded
slotDescriptions.groupingCriteriaExpandIcon: Icon displayed on the grouping column when the children are collapsed
slotDescriptions.headerFilterCell: Component responsible for showing menu adornment in Header filter row
slotDescriptions.headerFilterMenu: Component responsible for showing menu in Header filter row
slotDescriptions.loadIcon: Icon displayed on the input while processing.
slotDescriptions.loadingOverlay: Loading overlay component rendered when the grid is in a loading state.
slotDescriptions.longTextCellCollapseIcon: Icon displayed on the long text cell popup to collapse the content.
slotDescriptions.longTextCellExpandIcon: Icon displayed on the long text cell to expand the content.
slotDescriptions.menuItemCheckIcon: Icon displayed to indicate that a menu item is selected.
slotDescriptions.moreActionsIcon: Icon displayed on the `actions` column type to open the menu.
slotDescriptions.noColumnsOverlay: No columns overlay component rendered when the grid has no columns.
slotDescriptions.noResultsOverlay: No results overlay component rendered when the grid has no results after filtering.
slotDescriptions.noRowsOverlay: No rows overlay component rendered when the grid has no rows.
slotDescriptions.openFilterButtonIcon: Icon displayed on the open filter button present in the toolbar by default.
slotDescriptions.pagination: Pagination component rendered in the grid footer by default.
slotDescriptions.panel: Panel component wrapping the filters and columns panels.
slotDescriptions.pivotIcon: Icon used for the pivot icon
slotDescriptions.pivotMenuAddIcon: Icon displayed in the pivot menu for adding a field to a pivot section.
slotDescriptions.pivotMenuCheckIcon: Icon displayed in the pivot menu to signify a pivot section is selected.
slotDescriptions.pivotMenuMoveDownIcon: Icon displayed in the pivot menu for moving a field down.
slotDescriptions.pivotMenuMoveToBottomIcon: Icon displayed in the pivot menu for moving a field to the bottom.
slotDescriptions.pivotMenuMoveToTopIcon: Icon displayed in the pivot menu for moving a field to the top.
slotDescriptions.pivotMenuMoveUpIcon: Icon displayed in the pivot menu for moving a field up.
slotDescriptions.pivotMenuRemoveIcon: Icon displayed in the pivot menu for removing a field from the pivot.
slotDescriptions.pivotSearchClearIcon: Icon used for the clear button in the sidebar search field
slotDescriptions.pivotSearchIcon: Icon used for the search icon in the sidebar search field
slotDescriptions.promptAggregationIcon: Icon used to display aggregation changes
slotDescriptions.promptChangesToggleIcon: Icon used on the toggle button of the changes list
slotDescriptions.promptChartsIcon: Icon used to mark the request to visalize the data
slotDescriptions.promptFilterIcon: Icon used to display filter changes
slotDescriptions.promptGroupIcon: Icon used to display group changes
slotDescriptions.promptPivotIcon: Icon used to display pivot changes
slotDescriptions.promptRerunIcon: Icon used for the button that reruns a prompt
slotDescriptions.promptSendIcon: Icon used for the button that sends a prompt
slotDescriptions.promptSortAscIcon: Icon used to display sort ascending changes
slotDescriptions.promptSortDescIcon: Icon used to display sort descending changes
slotDescriptions.promptSpeechRecognitionIcon: Icon used for the button that starts and stops recording the prompt
slotDescriptions.promptSpeechRecognitionOffIcon: Icon used for when speech recognition is not supported
slotDescriptions.quickFilterClearIcon: Icon displayed on the quick filter reset input.
slotDescriptions.quickFilterIcon: Icon displayed on the quick filter input.
slotDescriptions.redoIcon: Icon displayed on the redo button in the toolbar.
slotDescriptions.rowCheckbox: Component rendered for each row selection checkbox.
slotDescriptions.rowReorderIcon: Icon displayed on the `reorder` column type to reorder a row.
slotDescriptions.sidebarCloseIcon: Icon displayed in the sidebar close button.
slotDescriptions.skeletonCell: Component rendered for each skeleton cell.
slotDescriptions.toolbar: Toolbar component rendered in the grid header.
slotDescriptions.treeDataCollapseIcon: Icon displayed on the tree data toggling column when the children are expanded
slotDescriptions.treeDataExpandIcon: Icon displayed on the tree data toggling column when the children are collapsed
slotDescriptions.undoIcon: Icon displayed on the undo button in the toolbar.
